name: 'Terraform Azure Deployment'

on:
  push:
    branches:
      - dev

jobs:
  terraform:
    name: 'Terraform Deploy'
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest

    steps:
    # 1. GitHub Repository se code nikalna
    - name: Checkout Code
      uses: actions/checkout@v4

    # 2. Azure me login karna using GitHub Secrets
    - name: Azure Login
      uses: azure/login@v2
      with:
        creds: ${{ secrets.AZURE_CREDENTIALS }}
        allow-no-subscriptions: true  # Yeh line add kar dena

    # 3. GitHub ke runner server par Terraform install karna
    - name: Setup Terraform
      uses: hashicorp/setup-terraform@v3



    # 4. Terraform Init chalana
    - name: Terraform Init
      run: terraform init

    # 5. Terraform Plan chalana
    - name: Terraform Plan
      run: terraform plan

    # 6. Terraform Apply chalana (Bina kisi confirmation ke)
    - name: Terraform Apply
      run: terraform apply -auto-approve
